ddls:
CREATE TABLE "partitions" (
  "partition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partition */,
  "partition_number" INTEGER /* Partition number in the simulation */,
  "num_elements" INTEGER /* Total number of elements in the partition */,
  "num_neighboring_ranks" INTEGER /* Number of neighboring ranks for the partition */,
  "max_mpi_faces_per_neighboring_rank" INTEGER /* Maximum number of MPI faces per neighboring rank */,
  "num_interior_elements" INTEGER /* Number of interior elements in the partition */,
  "num_mpi_elements" INTEGER /* Number of MPI elements in the partition */,
  "num_mpi_faces" INTEGER /* Total number of MPI faces in the partition */,
  "num_mpi_dr_faces" INTEGER /* Number of MPI DR (Direct Rupture) faces in the partition */,
  "num_dynamic_rupture_faces" INTEGER /* Number of dynamic rupture faces in the partition */,
  "num_free_surface_faces" INTEGER /* Number of free surface faces in the partition */,
  "num_transparent_faces" INTEGER /* Number of transparent faces in the partition */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulations table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the partition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the partition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g. running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, data scientist, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "simulation_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulations table */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run (e.g. running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partition_performance" (
  "partition_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partition performance entry */,
  "partition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the partitions table */,
  "simulation_run_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulation_runs table */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the partition performance was measured */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the partition performance measurement ended */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the partition as a percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the partition as a percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the partition performance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the partition performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partition_performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_simulation_permissions" (
  "user_simulation_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user simulation permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulations table */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level for the user and simulation (e.g. read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user simulation permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user simulation permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_simulation_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_metrics" (
  "simulation_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the simulations table */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g. CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the simulation metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_metric_id")
)
